commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=1bb1e539cbbbe459967c55c374e0a5c03d12284e)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Discord `mediaUrls` handling through send actions, outbound payload delivery, low-level media batching, overflow splitting, reply fanout, and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +220, Tests +288. Total +508 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main and v2026.6.10 still have scalar Discord media upload helpers, while PR head still collapses `mediaUrls` to one `mediaUrl` in the component-spec action branch. I did not run a live Discord round trip in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review should request the component-path fix, docs update, and contributor-owned live Discord proof; ClawSweeper repair should not queue while the real-setup proof gate remains unmet.

target.title: fix(discord): send multiple attachments per message
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves
Discord multi-attachment delivery was incomplete across three real paths:

- public Discord action surfaces accepted only scalar `mediaUrl`/`media` values and dropped `mediaUrls` arrays before they reached `sendMessageDiscord`;
- overflow attachment sends could retry the entire high-level delivery boundary, risking replay of already-sent batches if a later 10-file chunk failed;
- reply fanout for `replyToMode: "first"` was resolved before the multi-attachment send boundary, so the single-use reply could be consumed before the first actual Discord POST or applied inconsistently across overflow batches.

## Why This Change Was Made
Discord allows up to 10 files per message, so OpenClaw has to split larger `mediaUrls` arrays while keeping each actual REST POST independent. This patch keeps plural `mediaUrls` intact through the public action/runtime layers, passes a lazy `replyTo` resolver into multi-media sends so the low-level POST loop consumes it per batch, and removes the high-level retry wrapper around multi-batch deliveries so the existing Discord request retry handles only the failed POST.

Single-media, component fallback, and voice paths keep the previous string `replyTo` behavior. Voice sends now reject more than one media reference because Discord voice delivery is one file per message.

## User Impact
Users can send galleries through Discord with `mediaUrls` from both `sendMessage` and legacy `send` actions. Up to 10 attachments are sent in one Discord message; larger arrays are split into follow-up messages without losing the first reply reference.

If a transient Discord error happens on an overflow batch, OpenClaw retries that failed batch without reposting the earlier successful attachment batch. Reply modes such as `first` apply to the first real Discord message only, preserving thread context without duplicate reply references.

## Evidence
Head commit: `1bb1e539cbbbe459967c55c374e0a5c03d12284e`.

Local targeted behavior proof:

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/discord/src/send.sends-basic-channel-messages.test.ts extensions/discord/src/outbound-adapter.test.ts extensions/discord/src/actions/runtime.test.ts extensions/discord/src/actions/handle-action.test.ts` -> 4 files passed, 211 tests passed.
- `pnpm oxfmt --check extensions/discord/src/send.shared.ts extensions/discord/src/send.outbound.ts extensions/discord/src/outbound-payload.ts extensions/discord/src/actions/runtime.messaging.send.ts extensions/discord/src/actions/handle-action.ts extensions/discord/src/send.sends-basic-channel-messages.test.ts extensions/discord/src/outbound-adapter.test.ts extensions/discord/src/actions/runtime.test.ts extensions/discord/src/actions/handle-action.test.ts` -> all 9 touched files formatted.
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions:test` -> passed.
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions` -> passed.
- `git diff --check` -> no whitespace errors.

Behavior cases covered by the tests:

- public `sendMessage` forwards `mediaUrls` arrays into `sendMessageDiscord` and clears scalar `mediaUrl` when plural media is provided;
- legacy `send` maps `mediaUrls` arrays into the Discord send action;
- 11 attachments split into 10-file and 1-file Discord POSTs;
- `replyToMode: "first"` adds `message_reference` to the first overflow POST and not the second;
- a transient failure on the second overflow batch retries only that failed batch and does not replay the first successful batch;
- plain `mediaUrls` outbound delivery no longer retries the entire send boundary after `sendMessageDiscord` fails.
target.author: lin-hongkuan

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
